response.justification: Bogdan possesses an outstanding technical background in engineering productivity, having built testing frameworks, CI/CD pipelines, and developer tools. However, this is a Level II Manager role strictly requiring at least two years of formal people management. Bogdan's resume reflects a purely Individual Contributor (IC) and technical leadership track (Staff Engineer, Founder) with no mention of direct reports, 1-on-1s, or performance management, making him unsuitable for a full-time people-leadership position.
strengths: Over 15 years of software development experience with a strong focus on developer tools, testing infrastructure, and CI/CD.
Demonstrated technical leadership as a Staff Engineer and Founder, including mentoring via workshops and coding Dojos.
Direct experience with mobile platform development (iOS and Apple TV) and robust system architecture.
concerns: Zero documented experience in formal people management, conducting 1-on-1s, or handling performance reviews.
No evidence of strategic organizational roadmap planning or leading organizational change.
Highly focused on hands-on coding and individual contribution rather than team management and personnel development.
